research_provenance.methodology: HAR-RV with exogenous VIX regressor, log specification; OLS on dev window 2023-01-02 -> 2025-12-31; coefficients frozen into the artifact.
research_provenance.model_form: log RV_{t+1} = b0 + b1 log RV^(d) + b2 log RV^(w) + b3 log RV^(m) + b4 log VIX
research_provenance.notes: Coefficients frozen. Held-out window sealed until Phase 6. Uncertainty is the log-normal predictive SD (Phase-2 finding Mo2, state-dependent). Parameter-estimation uncertainty not modelled (Mo3).
